title: Arama Algoritmalari
subtitle: Dogrusal ve binary arama ornekleri.
code:
<?php

function linearSearch(array $arr, int $target): int {
    foreach ($arr as $index => $value) {
        if ($value == $target) {
            return $index;
        }
    }
    return -1;
}

function binarySearch(array $arr, int $target): int {
    $left = 0;
    $right = count($arr) - 1;

    while ($left <= $right) {
        $mid = intdiv($left + $right, 2);

        if ($arr[$mid] == $target) {
            return $mid;
        } elseif ($arr[$mid] < $target) {
            $left = $mid + 1;
        } else {
            $right = $mid - 1;
        }
    }
    return -1;
}

$numbers = [4, 12, 7, 23, 9, 1, 18];
$target = 23;

$linearResult = linearSearch($numbers, $target);
echo "Dogrusal arama: " . $target . " indeks " . $linearResult . "'de bulundu\n";

// Binary arama icin dizi siralanmali
$sortedNumbers = $numbers;
sort($sortedNumbers);

$binaryResult = binarySearch($sortedNumbers, $target);
echo "Binary arama: " . $target . " indeks " . $binaryResult . "'de bulundu\n";

$notFound = linearSearch($numbers, 99);
echo "\n99 araniyor (bulunamayacak): " . $notFound . "\n";

// PHP'nin in_array ve array_search fonksiyonlari
echo "\nin_array ile kontrol: " . (in_array($target, $numbers) ? "evet" : "hayir") . "\n";
echo "array_search ile konum: " . array_search($target, $numbers) . "\n";

?>
